# Safety Fixture PROJECT

Synthetic pre-cutover PROJECT.md for migrator safety tests (#497).  Marked as
user-authored (no `Generated by` marker) so `_is_user_customized` fires the
same way a real consumer project would.

## Project Configuration

**Tech Stack**: Python 3.11, pytest.

**Custom Rules**: Test fixtures MUST stay synthetic -- no slizard or external
data allowed.
